title: Local-first storage
html:
Stub. Architectural posture Yahir defaults to: device-resident encrypted data, optional cloud backup, never cloud-by-default. First explicit in the baby tracking app PRD (2024 12 04 requirements document 2); same instinct underlies Rankett's data model and the IRL Lore private-journal posture. Sibling of biometric privacy tradeoff thinking.

Connections: baby tracking app · rankett · irl lore · biometric privacy tradeoff

related.label: CS 461 Privacy-Friendly Baby Tracking App PRD (12/4/24)
